headline: AI Pioneers Unite to Launch the Shared AI License Foundation to Advance Foundation Model Innovation
summary: Summary: Leading AI companies announced the formation of the Shared AI License Foundation to promote the growth and development of foundation models.Participating companies grant non-exclusive licenses to patents covering AI foundation models.Efficient access to foundation model patents accelerates AI development and unlocks downstream breakthroughs.
